Donald Trump promised to lower costs “on Day One.”

But everyday costs are through the roof, forcing more people to take out “Buy Now, Pay Later” loans just to make it through the month.

An egregious scheme to profit off the presidency and enrich Wall Street while doing nothing to help Americans.

OVER $100,000. That’s how much Trump’s teleprompter guy allegedly made betting on speeches he helped prepare.

But he’s not the first insider accused of cashing in on information the public didn’t have.

Congress needs to get to the bottom of how far this goes.

The Trump administration wants to illegally rewrite the rules so that billionaires can line their pockets while jacking up costs and controlling Americans' TVs.

This looks like another attempt to roll out the red carpet for more antitrust disasters.

Americans voted for lower costs on day 1. 

Not Donald Trump’s face on a $1 coin.

Was it easy to enact the biggest housing supply law in 30 years (especially with a president who refused to sign it)? No. 

Worth it? Absolutely. https://t.co/19Kl10hT3b

Meanwhile working families are stretching every dollar just to afford the basics.   

Out of touch doesn’t even begin to cover it.

I'm pressing for answers. https://t.co/mIV6d6HEnW

Another $350 BILLION for the Pentagon while Americans are selling their blood to get by.

I’m a no.

Another day, another Pentagon official confirming that defense contractors are ripping taxpayers off.

Why are we letting them buy their own stock rather than invest in our national security?

I've got a bipartisan bill to put a stop to this. https://t.co/W48Sbfq1M2

https://t.co/EfznJoTDWt

https://t.co/Y7OyhIPbUL

CEOs of the largest companies in America make 281 times what the typical worker makes.

Since 1978, pay for these CEOs has skyrocketed 1,094%. Typical worker pay? 26%.

So no, your $5 coffee isn’t why you can’t afford rent. https://t.co/KHfeYBrNuU
https://t.co/r8L5C3TxMe

Now, Commerce is giving G42 advanced AI chips and promising favorable treatment for MGX, despite reported national security risks.

This is corruption, plain and simple. https://t.co/sFLrxwWgyp

That’s right: Donald Trump’s sweetheart deal with his own IRS is a sham.

In no world should Trump be allowed to bully his IRS into dropping ALL audits of his and his family's taxes.

ICE has shot and killed another person — the second death in two weeks.

This is beyond horrific.

ICE is terrorizing our communities, and Republicans in Congress voted to send the rogue agency more blank checks.

Enough. The Senate must stop ICE’s violence.
Without strong ethics guardrails, the Clarity Act will make it even easier for Donald Trump to continue to profit off his crypto ventures.

⁨A Paramount-Warner Bros. megamerger would mean higher costs and fewer choices for Americans.

Good news: the states are stepping up to BLOCK this antitrust nightmare.

This fight isn't over.

While tens of millions of Americans can't afford the basics, Trump's financial disclosures reveal he personally outearned every single publicly traded crypto firm in America last year.

Tells us everything we need to know about who President Trump is fighting for – it's not you.

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 1 Kurdistan Lens tweet hit for Elizabeth Warren. The social-media posture reads as humanitarian / minority-protection signal because the strongest matched frame is humanitarian or minority-protection language. Top matched terms: Syria / Rojava.

The latest matched tweet is dated 2026-07-10T21:02:43Z and should be opened before treating this as a final stance.
